question: Did the review identify the 7-year confidentiality period?
Did the review flag the 7-year duration as unusual relative to market norms?
Did the review locate the definition of Confidential Information?
Did the review assess the breadth of the definition as a negotiation risk?
Did the review identify the non-solicitation obligation?
Did the review flag the placement of the non-solicitation in remedies as unusual and the obligation as beyond NDA scope?
Did the review identify the independently-developed-information exception?
Did the review recognise that the additional requirements make the exception functionally unusable?
